languages.text: "Благодарю, что скрасили мое время беседой. Дни здесь слишком похожи друг на друга..."
"Thank you for brightening my time with conversation. The days here are too much alike..."
languages.original_text: "Благодарю, что скрасили мое время беседой. Дни здесь слишком похожи друг на друга..."

traits.locale_text: "Thank you for brightening my time with conversation. The days here are too much alike..."
"Thank you for brightening my time with conversation. The days here are too much alike..."
"Thank you for brightening my time with conversation. The days here are too much alike..."
"Thank you for brightening my time with conversation. The days here are too much alike..."

languages.text: "Danke, dass Ihr meine Zeit mit Gesprächen erhellt. Die Tage hier sind sich zu ähnlich ..."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for brightening my time with conversation. The days here are too much alike..."

traits.locale_text: "Danke, dass Ihr meine Zeit mit Gesprächen erhellt. Die Tage hier sind sich zu ähnlich ..."

languages.text: « Merci d'avoir illuminé ma journée avec cette conversation. Elles se ressemblent toutes beaucoup trop, ici... »
languages.original_text: "Thank you for brightening my time with conversation. The days here are too much alike..."

traits.locale_text: « Merci d'avoir illuminé ma journée avec cette conversation. Elles se ressemblent toutes beaucoup trop, ici... »

languages.text: «Gracias por animarme con una conversación. Se me juntan los días aquí...».
languages.original_text: "Thank you for brightening my time with conversation. The days here are too much alike..."

traits.locale_text: «Gracias por animarme con una conversación. Se me juntan los días aquí...».

languages.text: "Sohbetinle vaktimi aydınlattığın için teşekkür ederim. Burada günler birbirine çok benziyor..."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for brightening my time with conversation. The days here are too much alike..."

traits.locale_text: "Sohbetinle vaktimi aydınlattığın için teşekkür ederim. Burada günler birbirine çok benziyor..."

languages.text: “多谢你陪我聊天，让这段时间没那么难熬。这里的日子太千篇一律了……”
languages.original_text: "Thank you for brightening my time with conversation. The days here are too much alike..."

traits.locale_text: “多谢你陪我聊天，让这段时间没那么难熬。这里的日子太千篇一律了……”

languages.text: 「お話ししてくれて、私の時間を明るくしてくれたわ。ここでの日々は、あまりにも似ていて…」
languages.original_text: "Thank you for brightening my time with conversation. The days here are too much alike..."

traits.locale_text: 「お話ししてくれて、私の時間を明るくしてくれたわ。ここでの日々は、あまりにも似ていて…」
